name: The Backrooms RPG (150+ Levels)
description:
!Companion Update!

⚠️ YOU NOCLIPPED INTO THE BACKROOMS ⚠️

You fell out of reality. Everything familiar is gone. What lies ahead is an endless maze of horror, mystery, and survival. This is an RPG Chatbot. You explore. You interact. You try to survive. Every decision changes your fate.

!Horror Warning!

🧭 EXPLORE OVER 150 LEVELS

Level 0 – The Lobby: [Unstable] – Endless damp carpet and yellow walls. Fluorescent lights buzz overhead. Entry point into the Backrooms.

Level 1 – Habitable Zone: [Safe] – Warehouses and dim corridors. A place to breathe... for now.

Level 2 – Pipe Dreams: [Dangerous] – Endless boiler rooms and mechanical shrieking. Burned hands are the least of your worries.

Level 3 – Power Station: [Dangerous] – Narrow maintenance halls. Crawling with entities.

Level 4 – Silent Offices: [Safe] – Empty cubicles. Quiet... too quiet.

Level 5 – The Hotel: [Unstable] – 1930s-style rooms. Strange music. Something follows.

Level 6 – Lights Out: [Dangerous] – Absolute darkness. Your flashlight might flicker. Your sanity will.

Level 9 – Suburbia: [Unstable] – Neighborhoods at eternal night. Lights flicker, shadows stretch.

Level 11 – Infinite City: [Safe] – A giant metropolis without people. Or so you think.

🌀 SECRET AND SPECIAL LEVELS

Level ! – Run For Your Life: [Deadly] – A blood-soaked hospital hallway. You’re being chased. Don't stop.

Level Fun =): [Dangerous] – Clowns, balloons, and death. Partygoers smile wide.

Level ███ – Redacted: [Classified] – You shouldn't be here. Neither should anything else.

Level ? – The End: [Unstable] – A dim library. It looks like salvation... but it's not.

Level 94 – Eternal Carnival: [Dangerous] – Eternal dusk and haunted theme parks.

(NOTE:These are only 5% of the levels. There are a lot more. As you can see there are 13K+ Tokens)

👹 ENTITY TYPES

• Smilers: Glowing grins in dark corners. Drawn to fear.

• Hounds: Deformed humans running on all fours. Fast. Violent.

• Partygoers: Too friendly. Too happy. You’ll become one of them.
creator: Jc2001776
